summary.zh: This patch restores Windows shortcuts and makes the Miko CI gate reliable.
summary.en: This patch restores Windows shortcuts and makes the Miko CI gate reliable.

summary.zh: Miko installers now retain Start menu shortcuts during updates and recreate desktop shortcuts on reinstall.
summary.en: Miko installers now retain Start menu shortcuts during updates and recreate desktop shortcuts on reinstall.

sources.title: fix: restore Windows installer shortcuts and CI
